ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "exp" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the character */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* Dexterity attribute of the character */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* Wisdom attribute of the character */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was last active */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the character's profile image */,
  "background_story" TEXT /* Background story or biography of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the player's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the player's last activity */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the player's account */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile image */,
  "friends_list" TEXT /* List of player IDs of the player's friends */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild the player is a member of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "exp" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the character */,
  "current_quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current quest the character is on */,
  "completed_quests" TEXT /* List of quest IDs that the character has completed */,
  "current_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current in-game event the character is participating in */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements the character has earned */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the progress was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progress_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute update */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* Dexterity attribute of the character */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* Wisdom attribute of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina points of the character */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy points of the character */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense attribute of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed attribute of the character */,
  "luck" INTEGER /* Luck attribute of the character */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Critical hit chance attribute of the character */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the attributes were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "friend_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend player */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the friend was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_friend_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "guild_name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  "guild_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is the leader of the guild */,
  "guild_description" TEXT /* Description of the guild */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the guild was created */,
  "member_list" TEXT /* List of player IDs of the guild members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guilds_guild_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("guild_leader_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the item in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "reward_exp" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* List of item IDs and quantities rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "quest_requirements" TEXT /* List of requirements to start the quest */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_reward_items FOREIGN KEY ("reward_items") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* List of rewards for participating in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_rewards FOREIGN KEY ("rewards") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "reward_exp" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for earning the achievement */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* List of item IDs and quantities rewarded for earning the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_reward_items FOREIGN KEY ("reward_items") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
